name_en: 🔥Brand new Jacquard Canvas LOE💎WE Font Tote Handbag 👜The LOE💎WE Font Tote is a rectangular handbag featuring a contrasting LOE✨WE logo 🧸The medium size is made of jacquard canvas 🩶with leather trim.*Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable adjustable shoulder strap*Fabric lining
